hooks.command: bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [[ -z "$f" ]] && exit 0; SRC="/Users/odin/Desktop/Стилометрія"; DST="/tmp/dims_project"; [[ "$f" != "$SRC"/* ]] && exit 0; rel="${f#$SRC/}"; case "$rel" in app.py|templates/*|static/*|core/*.py) mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DST/$rel")" && cp "$f" "$DST/$rel" && echo "✓ synced $rel → /tmp/dims_project/" ;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; branch=$(git -C "/Users/odin/Desktop/Стилометрія" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$branch" == "main" ]] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git[[:space:]]+(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)" && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "checkout|branch[[:space:]]+-"; then echo "⛔ BLOCKED: ви на main. Створіть feature-гілку: git checkout -b feature/<назва>" >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
